parameters.subject: =New Comment Added on SubTask: {{$json.subtask_title}}
parameters.html:
=

Dear {{$json.recipient_firstname}} {{$json.recipient_lastname}},

A new comment has been added to the subtask {{$json.subtask_title}} for your review.

Comment Details

Subtask Title {{$json.subtask_title}}
Commented By {{$json.commented_by_firstname}} {{$json.commented_by_lastname}}
Comment {{$json.comment_body}}
Subtask Created On {{$json.subtask_created_on}}
Subtask End On {{$json.subtask_end_on}}
Parent Task Title {{$json.parent_task_title}}
Milestone Title {{$json.milestone_title}}
Project Title {{$json.project_title}}
Task Link View Subtask Details

Please review the comment and respond if any action is required.

Regards,
Task Collaboration System

parameters.query:
SELECT
  c.id                         AS comment_id,
  c.body                       AS comment_body,
  c.created_at                 AS comment_created_at,
  c.commentor_id               AS commented_by_id,

  commenter.firstname          AS commented_by_firstname,
  commenter.lastname           AS commented_by_lastname,
  commenter.email              AS commented_by_email,

  t.id                         AS subtask_id,
  t.title                      AS subtask_title,
  t.created_at                 AS subtask_created_on,
  t.target_date                AS subtask_end_on,
  t.parent_id                  AS parent_task_id,

  pt.title                     AS parent_task_title,
  pt.project_management_id     AS parent_task_project_id,

  m.id                         AS milestone_id,
  m.title                      AS milestone_title,

  pm.id                        AS project_id,
  pm.title                     AS project_title,

  owner.firstname              AS task_owner_firstname,
  owner.lastname               AS task_owner_lastname,
  owner.email                  AS task_owner_email,

  u.id                         AS mentioned_user_id,
  u.firstname                  AS mentioned_user_firstname,
  u.lastname                   AS mentioned_user_lastname,
  u.email                      AS mentioned_user_email

FROM comments c

JOIN task_managements t
  ON t.id = c.commentable_id
 AND c.commentable_type = 'TaskManagement'

JOIN spree_users owner
  ON owner.id = t.responsible_person_id

LEFT JOIN task_managements pt
  ON pt.id = t.parent_id

LEFT JOIN milestones m
  ON m.id = pt.milestone_id

LEFT JOIN project_managements pm
  ON pm.id = COALESCE(
       m.project_management_id,
       pt.project_management_id
     )

LEFT JOIN spree_users commenter
  ON commenter.id = c.commentor_id

LEFT JOIN spree_users u
  ON c.body REGEXP CONCAT('\\@\\[.*\\]\\(', u.id, '\\)')

WHERE
  c.created_at >= UTC_TIMESTAMP() - INTERVAL 10 MINUTE
  AND t.parent_id IS NOT NULL
  AND owner.organization_id IN (13, 14, 59, 84);

SELECT
  id,
  email
FROM spree_users
WHERE id IN ({{ $json.mentioned_user_ids.join(',') }});

parameters.query:
SELECT
  -- Comment details
  c.id                         AS comment_id,
  c.body                       AS comment_body,
  c.created_at                 AS comment_created_at,
  c.commentor_id               AS commented_by_id,

  -- Commented by user
  commenter.firstname          AS commented_by_firstname,
  commenter.lastname           AS commented_by_lastname,
  commenter.email              AS commented_by_email,

  -- Subtask details
  t.id                         AS subtask_id,
  t.title                      AS subtask_title,
  t.created_at                 AS subtask_created_on,
  t.target_date                AS subtask_end_on,
  t.parent_id                  AS parent_task_id,

  -- Parent task details
  pt.title                     AS parent_task_title,
  pt.project_management_id      AS parent_task_project_id,

  -- Milestone via parent task
  m.id                         AS milestone_id,
  m.title                      AS milestone_title,

  -- Project via milestone OR directly from parent task
  pm.id                        AS project_id,
  pm.title                     AS project_title,

  -- Subtask owner (responsible person)
  owner.firstname              AS task_owner_firstname,
  owner.lastname               AS task_owner_lastname,
  owner.email                  AS task_owner_email,

  -- Mentioned users in comment body
  u.id                         AS mentioned_user_id,
  u.firstname                  AS mentioned_user_firstname,
  u.lastname                   AS mentioned_user_lastname,
  u.email                      AS mentioned_user_email

FROM comments c

-- Subtask
JOIN task_managements t
  ON t.id = c.commentable_id
 AND c.commentable_type = 'TaskManagement'

-- Subtask owner
JOIN spree_users owner
  ON owner.id = t.responsible_person_id

-- Parent task
LEFT JOIN task_managements pt
  ON pt.id = t.parent_id

-- Milestone via parent task
LEFT JOIN milestones m
  ON m.id = pt.milestone_id

-- Project via milestone OR parent task
LEFT JOIN project_managements pm
  ON pm.id = COALESCE(
       m.project_management_id,   -- preferred
       pt.project_management_id   -- fallback
     )

-- Commented by user
LEFT JOIN spree_users commenter
  ON commenter.id = c.commentor_id

-- Mentioned users in comment body
LEFT JOIN spree_users u
  ON c.body REGEXP CONCAT('\\@\\[.*\\]\\(', u.id, '\\)')

WHERE
  c.created_at >= UTC_TIMESTAMP() - INTERVAL 40 MINUTE
  AND t.parent_id IS NOT NULL;   -- only comments on subtasks

mySql.name: New FM UAT Task Management Database

parameters.query:
SELECT
  c.id                         AS comment_id,
  ANY_VALUE(c.body)            AS comment_body,
  ANY_VALUE(c.created_at)      AS comment_created_at,
  ANY_VALUE(c.commentor_id)    AS commented_by_id,

  ANY_VALUE(commenter.firstname) AS commented_by_firstname,
  ANY_VALUE(commenter.lastname)  AS commented_by_lastname,
  ANY_VALUE(commenter.email)     AS commented_by_email,

  ANY_VALUE(t.id)              AS subtask_id,
  ANY_VALUE(t.title)           AS subtask_title,
  ANY_VALUE(t.created_at)      AS subtask_created_on,
  ANY_VALUE(t.target_date)     AS subtask_end_on,
  ANY_VALUE(t.parent_id)       AS parent_task_id,

  ANY_VALUE(pt.title)          AS parent_task_title,
  ANY_VALUE(pt.project_management_id) AS parent_task_project_id,

  ANY_VALUE(m.id)              AS milestone_id,
  ANY_VALUE(m.title)           AS milestone_title,

  ANY_VALUE(pm.id)             AS project_id,
  ANY_VALUE(pm.title)          AS project_title,

  ANY_VALUE(owner.firstname)   AS task_owner_firstname,
  ANY_VALUE(owner.lastname)    AS task_owner_lastname,
  ANY_VALUE(owner.email)       AS task_owner_email,

  IFNULL(
    GROUP_CONCAT(
      DISTINCT CONCAT(u.email, '||', u.firstname, '||', u.lastname)
    ),
    ''
  ) AS mentioned_users

FROM comments c

JOIN task_managements t
  ON t.id = c.commentable_id
 AND c.commentable_type = 'TaskManagement'

JOIN spree_users owner
  ON owner.id = t.responsible_person_id

LEFT JOIN task_managements pt
  ON pt.id = t.parent_id

LEFT JOIN milestones m
  ON m.id = pt.milestone_id

LEFT JOIN project_managements pm
  ON pm.id = COALESCE(
       m.project_management_id,
       pt.project_management_id
     )

LEFT JOIN spree_users commenter
  ON commenter.id = c.commentor_id

LEFT JOIN spree_users u
  ON c.body REGEXP CONCAT('\\(', u.id, '\\)')

WHERE
  c.created_at >= UTC_TIMESTAMP() - INTERVAL 10 MINUTE
  AND t.parent_id IS NOT NULL
  AND owner.organization_id IN (13, 14, 59, 84)

GROUP BY c.id;

parameters.html:
=

Dear {{ $json.recipient_firstname }} {{ $json.recipient_lastname }},

A new comment has been added to the subtask {{$json.subtask_title}} for your review.
